goal: Prove that the chat harness is a usable proof surface for the end-to-end Cortex read path.

tests.title: Submit A Question Through The Cortex-backed Path
tests.objective: submit a question through the Cortex-backed path
preconditions: The epic requirements and technical spec are available.
The current implementation plan is up to date.
procedure: Review the relevant requirements, technical spec, and implementation-plan.json entries for this deliverable.
Execute or inspect the implementation work needed to prove the scenario.
Capture evidence under tests/ and record any gaps back into the epic artifacts.
expected_results: submit a question through the Cortex-backed path
failure_conditions: the harness hides the retrieval behavior completely
later OpenClaw integration would require redefining Cortex semantics

exit_criteria: The epic test plan covers the implementation plan deliverables.
Required evidence exists for the executed scenarios.
Open failures are specific enough to route back into the implementation loop.
